## Verses (12)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The sin of the evil-doer says in his heart, There is no fear of the Lord before his eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For he takes comfort in the thought that his sin will not be uncovered and hated. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | In the words of his mouth are evil and deceit; he has given up being wise and doing good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He gives thought to evil on his bed; he takes a way which is not good; he is not a hater of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Your mercy, O Lord, is in the heavens, and your strong purpose is as high as the clouds. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Your righteousness is like the mountains of God; your judging is like the great deep; O Lord, you give life to man and beast. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | How good is your loving mercy, O God! the children of men take cover under the shade of your wings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The delights of your house will be showered on them; you will give them drink from the river of your pleasures. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For with you is the fountain of life: in your light we will see light. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | O let there be no end to your loving mercy to those who have knowledge of you, or of your righteousness to the upright in heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Let not the foot of pride come against me, or the hand of the evil-doers put me out of my place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | There the workers of evil have come down: they have been made low, and will not be lifted up. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
